title: Remove obsolete examples/ and XML manifest scripts from superrepo root
body:
Drops root `examples/*.bd`, legacy `manifests/*.xml` variants, `scripts/setup-environment.sh`, and `install-repo-tool.sh` from the default contributor path in favor of repo manifest + lazygit workflows (`510f302`, `7aec056`).

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`7aec056`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/7aec056)
- **Subject:** remove bsharp
- **Completed:** 2026-05-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Drops root `examples/*.bd`, legacy `manifests/*.xml` variants, `scripts/setup-environment.sh`, and `install-repo-tool.sh` from the default contributor path in favor of repo manifest + lazygit workflows (`510f302`, `7aec056`).
